docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SILVIA MAKCAY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MARTIN, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT TURU, ANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JEFFREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURU, ANA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
